data.content:
All **27 tests pass**. Here's a summary of what was created:

**`src/Store/ShoppingCart.cs`** — Full implementation:
- `AddItem` — accumulates quantity for duplicate SKUs, validates inputs
- `RemoveItem` — removes by SKU, throws if not found
- `CalculateTotal` — sums `qty × price` with coupon discount
- `ApplyCoupon` — supports `SAVE10` (10%) and `SAVE20` (20%), case-insensitive

**`tests/Store.Tests/ShoppingCartTests.cs`** — 27 MSTest v4 tests covering:

| Area | Tests |
|---|---|
| AddItem (happy path) | single item, multiple items, duplicate SKU, price update, zero price |
| AddItem (validation) | null SKU, empty SKU, zero qty, negative qty, negative price |
| RemoveItem | existing item, last item, not found, null SKU, double-remove |
| CalculateTotal | empty cart, add-then-remove |
| ApplyCoupon | 10%, 20%, case-insensitive, empty cart, coupon replacement, invalid/null/empty codes |
| Integration | full workflow, coupon-before-items |
